mapper.select: SELECT id, knowledge_id, ticket_id, session_id, query_text, feedback_type, comment, created_by, created_at FROM rag_feedback WHERE knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT knowledge_id AS knowledgeId, COUNT(1) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'HELPFUL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS helpful, SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'NOT_HELPFUL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notHelpful, SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'WRONG_REFERENCE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wrongReference FROM rag_feedback GROUP BY knowledge_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT feedback_type AS feedbackType, COUNT(1) AS total FROM rag_feedback GROUP BY feedback_type ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT query_text AS queryText, COUNT(1) AS total FROM rag_feedback WHERE feedback_type IN ('NOT_HELPFUL', 'WRONG_REFERENCE') GROUP BY query_text ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT knowledge_id AS knowledgeId, SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type = 'HELPFUL' THEN 1.0 WHEN feedback_type = 'NEUTRAL' THEN 0.0 WHEN feedback_type = 'NOT_HELPFUL' THEN -1.0 WHEN feedback_type = 'WRONG_REFERENCE' THEN -2.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS feedbackScore FROM rag_feedback GROUP BY knowledge_id
